name: Curried Potatoes and Peas (Aloo Matar Rasedaa
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil potatoes for 5 minutes in lightly salted water. Drain and set potatoes aside.
2. In a large skillet, sauté turmeric, cumin powder, chili powder, and cumin seed in olive oil.
3. Add potatoes to the skillet and stir to coat with spices.
4. Add chopped tomatoes and simmer until the potatoes are tender, about 20 minutes.
5. Stir in peas, cover, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Per serving: 253 calories, 7g protein, 165mg sodium, 42g carbohydrates, 8g fat, 0mg cholesterol, 33mg calcium
Source: Vegetarian Gourmet, Autumn 1993
